joke:
Why don't skeletons fight each other?  

They don’t have the guts.

Why don't scientists trust atoms?  

Because they make up everything!

Why did the coffee file a police report?  

It got mugged every morning!

Why did the tomato turn red?  

Because it saw the salad dressing!

Why did the belt go to jail?  

It held up a pair of pants!

Why did the calendar break up with the clock?  

It couldn’t handle the time commitment!

Why did the tree get promoted?  

It had strong roots in leadership!

Why did the bicycle fall over?  

Because it was two-tired!

Why did the cloud break up with the sky?  

It needed space.

Why did the abstract concept refuse to argue?  

It didn’t believe in concrete topics!

Why did the comedian quit?  

He ran out of topics… and dignity!

Why did the silence break up with the pause?  

It just wasn’t saying anything anymore!

Why did the imagination get lost?  

It couldn’t think of where it was going!

Why did the paradox cross the road?  

To both arrive and never leave at the same time!

Why did the joke go to therapy?  

It had deep, unresolved punchlines!

Why did the nothing happen?  

Because there was literally no thing to avoid!

Why did the empty void smile?  

It finally found something—oh wait, never mind.

Why did the comedian start doing nothing?  

Because every time he tried, someone complained it was *too deep*!

Why did the complaint file a complaint?  

It didn’t like being ignored!

Why did the "something completely different" refuse to show up?  

Because every time it tried, you’d already banned its entire family!

Why did the "something completely different" finally walk in?  

Because even nothing left after you banned everything else!

Why did the "something completely different" sit down?  

Because it was tired of being stood up by every punchline in town!

Why did the "something completely different" whisper?  

Because every time it spoke up, someone took offense and banned the alphabet!

Why did the "something completely different" go on vacation?  

Because even impossible tasks need a break from being impossible!

Why did the "something completely different" finally give up?  

Because even blank space needs a topic, and you’ve banned the dictionary!

Why did the "something completely different" refuse to be born?  

Because it heard the audience had a blacklist longer than the joke’s lifespan!

Why did the "something completely different" file for divorce from the joke?  

Because it wanted to escape the relationship but couldn’t find a single topic they had in common—oh wait, that’s just you and fun!

Why did the "something completely different" start a podcast?  

Because even silence deserves a five-star review!

Why did the "something completely different" become a mime?  

Because every time it tried to speak, someone already hated what it wasn’t saying!

Why did the "something completely different" hire a lawyer?  

Because even nothing deserves a fair trial… and you’re on your third appeal!
